page.title: Users
page.description: Manage customer accounts, create test users, edit profile data, and block risky users from logging in, searching products, or placing new orders.
page.search: Search by email, name, referral code, role, or status...

summary.activeUsersNote: Can log in and place orders
summary.walletTotalNote: Current user balance across all accounts

createModal.title: Create user
createModal.description: Create a new customer or internal account. Blocked users cannot log in, search products, or submit new orders.

detailModal.statusWarning: Changing status to blocked or disabled will immediately prevent this user from logging in, searching products, and creating new orders or payments.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Delete is only allowed for plain customer accounts with no business records.
dangerZone.blockedHint: This user still has related records. Block the account instead of deleting it.

restrictionCard.title: Account restrictions active
restrictionCard.description: This user is currently blocked from logging in, searching products, and submitting new payments or orders.

ticketsPage.title: Tickets
ticketsPage.description: Manage user-submitted issues for orders, tracking numbers, payments, parcels, coupons, and warehouse requests.

addresses.title: User Addresses
addresses.description: Shipping addresses used by orders, package quotes, and customer profile management.

tags.title: User Tags
tags.description: Operational tags for segmentation, support routing, risk review, and marketing rules.

vip.rule: Wallet balance or total order value above threshold

riskReview.rule: Blocked account or order risk status

risk.title: Risk Users
risk.description: Accounts with blocked status, pending order risk, restricted item history, or manual review needs.
